cards.name: American Express® Platinum Card
cards.rewards: 1 Membership Rewards point for every INR 40 spent; 3X Membership Rewards points on all overseas spending
cards.lounge: Access to 1,550+ airport lounges across 500+ airports worldwide via the Global Lounge Collection, including The Centurion Lounge, Priority Pass lounges, Delta Sky Club lounges and domestic partner lounges in India
cards.welcome_benefit: Welcome gift worth up to INR 60,000 with option to choose from Taj Hotels, Luxe Gift Card, or The Postcard Hotels & Resorts

cards.name: American Express® Gold Card
cards.rewards: 1 Membership Rewards Point for every INR 50 spent (including utilities); 1,000 bonus points on 6 transactions of INR 1,000 each every calendar month
cards.welcome_benefit: 4,000 Bonus Membership Rewards Points as a welcome gift (first year, on fee payment and qualifying spend)
cards.badge: Up to 20% off dining at select restaurant partners
